The relaxed outdoor atmosphere makes it easy to explore with kids.

description: Game On! explores the intersection of science, sports, and play through engaging interactive displays. This free exhibition invites families to discover the science behind physical activity and how movement transforms the human experience. It's a perfect blend of learning and active fun for all ages.
address: 700 Exposition Park Dr, Los Angeles, CA 90037

title: Jaws: The Exhibition
description: The Academy Museum examines Steven Spielberg's groundbreaking 1975 blockbuster and its cultural impact through original props and behind-the-scenes materials. Families can explore how this iconic film changed Hollywood forever and learn about the making of the movie that made everyone afraid to go in the water. Visitors 17 and under receive free admission to the museum.
city: The Academy Museum of Motion Pictures
price: Included with admission; (Visitors 17 and under get in free)

Families can discover how this groundbreaking blockbuster changed cinema forever, with free admission for children 17 and under making it an accessible way to dive into movie history.
city: The Academy Museum of Motion Pictures
price: Included with admission; (Visitors 17 and under get in free)

description: The Skirball Cultural Center brings flood stories from cultures around the world to life through imaginative puppet shows performed with repurposed suitcases and boxes. This fascinating exhibition reveals the science behind mummification through engaging displays and artifacts that make ancient history accessible and captivating for older children and families.
address: 700 Exposition Park Dr, Los Angeles, CA 90037
